top_signals.title: Treasury yields edge higher as U.S. and Iran exchange strikes
top_signals.summary: Treasury yields rose Monday after the U.S. and Iran exchanged fire near the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Keynote speech by Commissioner Kubilius at the European Business Angel Network Congress
top_signals.summary:
European Commission Speech Vilnius, 01 Jun 2026 Good morning,
Welcome, everyone to my home country, Lithuania, and my home town, Vilnius.
Happy to speak at a conference of business angels.
War and angels - do...
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The Funding: How crypto hedge funds are navigating weak markets
top_signals.summary: As crypto markets remain weak, fund managers say asset selection, fundamentals, and alpha matter more than ever.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Dev helps rescue $2 million locked in 2016 ICO contract for nine years with whitehat exploit
top_signals.summary: The developer told The Block that two of 48 eligible investors have already claimed 96.5 ETH that was unfrozen, worth nearly $200,000 at current prices.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Cardano Foundation cancels 2026 summit after treasury funding vote falls just short
top_signals.summary: The measure needed two-thirds support but got only 65%, even after late endorsements from Cardano's founder and the Foundation CEO.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
